title: Scroll, Liquid, Split & Snap
description: Staggered parallax reveals, CSS Subgrid magazine layout, character-split text, SVG gooey buttons, and a physics carousel.

drops.title: Staggered Parallax Reveal
drops.description: IntersectionObserver triggers staggered entry animations — each element slides in with a cascading delay.
drops.concept: Every element on the page is observed by IntersectionObserver. On entry, a CSS class triggers a GPU-composited opacity+transform transition. Adjacent elements get increasing transition-delay values, creating a cascade without JS timers. A parallax layer scrolls at 40% of scroll speed for spatial depth.

drops.title: CSS Subgrid Magazine
drops.description: A print-style editorial layout where nested cards align on the parent grid via grid-template-columns: subgrid.
drops.concept: CSS Subgrid (Grid Level 2) allows nested grid children to participate in the ancestor's column and row tracks. This demo shows a newspaper-style layout where a 5-column story row aligns perfectly on an 8-column parent grid — no manual column math required. Toggle the alignment to see subgrid vs fixed columns.

interaction.click: Toggle subgrid alignment and grid column lines

drops.title: SplitType Character Reveal
drops.description: Text split into wrapped characters — four reveal styles: rise, blur, wave, and real-time scramble.
drops.concept: A vanilla JS reimplementation of the SplitType pattern: each word is wrapped in overflow:hidden, each character in its own span. CSS classes toggle translate/opacity/filter transitions with staggered delays. The scramble effect replaces characters with random symbols and resolves letter-by-letter over a timed loop.

interaction.scroll: Trigger each reveal style by scrolling
interaction.click: Click scramble text to cycle phrases

drops.title: SVG Gooey Liquid Buttons
drops.description: SVG feGaussianBlur + feColorMatrix alpha threshold creates liquid merging between adjacent buttons.
drops.concept: The gooey filter applies feGaussianBlur to soften element edges, then feColorMatrix boosts and clips the alpha channel — elements that overlap appear to merge like liquid. Applied to a container, all children share the same goo field. Five demos: merging buttons, liquid pill nav, burst click, magnetic hover, and elastic dot cluster.

interaction.mouse: Hover buttons to see liquid merging
interaction.click: Click burst buttons for blob animation

drops.title: Momentum Inertia Carousel
drops.description: Drag-and-release carousel with velocity tracking, exponential friction decay, and spring-snap settling.
drops.concept: On pointer-down, track cursor velocity. On release, apply velocity to offset each frame, multiplied by a friction coefficient (default 0.94) to simulate deceleration. When velocity drops below threshold, switch to spring mode: each frame, offset += (snapTarget - offset) * stiffness. Tunable sliders expose friction, stiffness, and velocity threshold.

interaction.mouse: Drag carousel left/right, release to feel inertia
interaction.click: Arrow buttons or dots to snap
